problem id: dbb611da
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  11111000 -> 00000001
  00101100 -> 00000000
  10011011 -> 00000100
  01000101 -> 10000010
  01001000 -> 00000000
  11000011 -> 10000110
  11101001 -> 10000011
  10001101 -> 00000000
  10010011 -> 00000100

query: 10100000
predicted answer: 00000001
